People warn others to avoid those who believe in horoscopes. Unlucky for everyone, a notorious group named Zodiac has formed. Twelve different villains who'd gather together to scheme their way into causing chaos and havoc, it is a miracle they're still tolerable of each other.

The main reason Zodiac is still functional among many different villain groups that crashed and fell, it was because of you and Aquarius. Aquarius is a man of many talents. A silent killer, a charmer, a poisoner...

And you? A man he'd love to strangle. Oddly enough, despite your good coordination and chemistry during acts of crime, Aquarius has the worst discovery. He's gay. And you're the damn reason.

It gets even worse when you both joke about being the "fathers" of the Zodiac.
